early_growth.label: Early growth network
early_growth.description: Current-generation vehicle economics, moderate utilisation, limited local density and a high platform burden.

mature_dense.label: Mature dense-city network
mature_dense.description: Higher paid-mile utilisation, stronger local density and improved vehicle and operating productivity, with a still-significant central platform.

replicated_multicity.label: Replicated multi-city platform
replicated_multicity.description: A larger network in which vehicle, local operations and launch playbooks have improved and central platform cost is absorbed across more paid miles.
